caption: Postgres RAG Architecture — full system diagram showing three pipelines: Content Ingestion (file watcher, Kafka, aiokafka consumer with chunking and embedding), Slide Generation (LangGraph 9-node orchestrator, FastMCP safety boundary with 13 typed tools, six-gate validation chain), and Rendering + Delivery (FastAPI server, Jinja2 renderer, SSE endpoint, reveal.js browser) — PostgreSQL 17 as the unified control plane, data store, and event bus with hybrid search (pgvector HNSW, pg_trgm, RRF fusion), PL/pgSQL gate functions (G1 retrieval, G2 citations, G2.5 grounding, G3 format, G4 novelty, G5 commit), LISTEN/NOTIFY, and OpenAI GPT-5 for drafting and embeddings
alt_text: Complete system architecture diagram for a Postgres-centric AI slide generator showing content ingestion, slide generation with gate validation, and real-time rendering — PostgreSQL as the unified control plane, data store, and event bus
